purpose: Reference slide patterns for generating solution architecture diagrams as PNG files from user input.

input_contract.title: string
input_contract.subtitle: string optional
input_contract.template: one of: platform_value_chain, composite_ai_platform, cloud_tenant_microservices, enterprise_endpoint_management, cloud_data_platform
input_contract.lanes: array of source/target side lanes with label, items, side
input_contract.zones: array of main architecture zones with title, subtitle, items, columns, color
input_contract.flows: array of arrows between item ids or zone ids with label and direction

templates.name: Connected intelligence / low-code AI platform overview
visual_rules: Use 4 to 6 large rounded capability blocks in the center.
Place data sources on the left and business outputs on the right.
Use bold black ribbon labels above major capability groups.
Reserve a bottom band for operations, audit, workflow automation, and SSO.

templates.name: Composite AI capability platform map
visual_rules: Use a central grouped platform boundary.
Create vertical groups such as Channel Hub, AI for Business, AI for IT, and Agentic Ecosystem.
Show transforming businesses on the left and transforming service lines on the right.
Use small tiles for reusable core solutions at the bottom.

templates.name: Cloud microservices with tenant system and peripheral integration
templates.reference: Uploaded AWS cloud microservices architecture image
visual_rules: Use left-to-right flow from operator/peripherals to tenant system to cloud services.
Show security services on the left edge of cloud platform and storage/messaging at the top.
Place REST microservices in a central EC2 or container platform box.
Place back-office portal and tenant onboarding capabilities at the bottom.

templates.name: Enterprise endpoint, app, policy, identity, and security management
templates.reference: Uploaded Microsoft Intune-style product family image
visual_rules: Use a large tinted service canvas with internal policy/configuration blocks.
Represent identity, app stores, SaaS apps, and on-premises systems around the boundary.
Group managed devices by enrollment model at the bottom.
Use arrows for compliance, targeting, authentication, and data/reporting flows.

templates.name: Cloud data platform with ingestion, governance, processing, and access layers
templates.reference: Public AWS/PwC Unified Sustainability Hub architecture image
visual_rules: Use four vertical macro areas: data sources, ingestion, compute/storage/catalog/governance, and access/delivery.
Put the lakehouse/data tiers across the top of the core platform.
Place stream processing, metadata, control, and common platform services in bottom bands.
Use right-side cards for analytics users, downstream apps, orchestration, and AI/ML.

generation_guidelines.diagram_density: Prefer 20-45 labeled boxes. Keep labels short. Use multi-line wrapping.
generation_guidelines.icon_policy: Use simple geometric icons or labeled chips unless a licensed icon library is provided by the user.
generation_guidelines.style_policy: The output should be original and reference the layout patterns, not copy exact proprietary artwork.
